description_long: This object is a solid, circular band with a consistent width and a smooth, rounded profile. The exterior surface appears to have a subtle, slightly textured pattern, giving it a tactile quality without any visible engravings or embellishments. The color is a deep, uniform black, suggesting it may be made from a modern material such as black ceramic, tungsten carbide, or silicone. The interior is smooth and unadorned, designed for comfortable wear. There are no visible gemstones, inlays, or additional decorative elements. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A solid black circular band with a subtle textured surface and a minimalist, unadorned design.
description_view_0: A top-down view showing the full circular opening and the smooth, unembellished inner and outer surfaces.
description_view_1: A side profile view highlighting the consistent width and the slightly textured, rounded edge of the band.
description_view_2: A bottom-up view mirroring the top, displaying the circular opening and the uniform surface.
description_view_3: A side profile view identical to view 1, showing the band’s thickness and subtle surface texture.
